After eliminating Rehman Dakait, Hamza's new objective is to take down the enigmatic and formidable ISI strategist, Major Iqbal, also known as 'Bade Sahab', who is believed to be the mastermind behind numerous terror attacks on Indian soil. title: Parasakthi
description: Based on true events, the film revolves around the Anti-Hindi Imposition agitations in Tamil Nadu that happened in 1965

title: With Love
description: Sathya, who is skeptical about arranged marriages, agrees to a blind date set up by his sister. He meets Monisha, and they are surprised to learn they were schoolmates. This chance encounter leads them on a nostalgic journey to track down their childhood crushes and seek closure. As they delve into their pasts, they navigate humorous and emotional situations, ultimately forging a deep connection with each other.

title: Premalu
description: Premalu happens to provide an enjoyable glimpse into the daily routines of young adults dealing with their first employment opportunity and figuring out their newfound freedom while detached from home.

title: Avatar
description: Avatar: The Seed Bearer (Avatar 3) Earlier Scheduled to release on Dec 16th, 2023, now the release date is pushed further to Dec 20th, 2024 due to the Covid pandemic.

title: Lucky
description: The Super Star is a Tamil comedy-drama that revolves around a lost puppy named Lucky. This mischievous and heartwarming canine enters the lives of a troubled child and a broken family, bringing about significant positive changes. title: Middle Class
description: Karl Marx, a middle-class man with a simple dream of owning farmland, lives a routine life with his outspoken wife and two children. When an unexpected opportunity finally brings his dream within reach, chaos and pressure push him into a frantic, heartfelt journey. Middle Class follows his race against time to change his life.
